data.title: Cyber 5 online sales set new record as shoppers spend $44.2 billion
data.description: Social media, BNPL and AI tools fueled online sales during the Cyber 5, which includes Thanksgiving and the four days that follow.

data.title: UNFI’s AI and digital overhaul gains momentum as fiscal 2026 begins
data.description: United Natural Foods Inc.’s leadership framed the quarter as part of a broader transformation aimed at helping retailers compete with better insights, faster replenishment and more digitally driven merchandising.

data.title: AppDirect moves to acquire Tackle, aiming to unify all B2B software routes to market
data.description: The acquisition deal would strengthen AppDirect's push to offer an end-to-end subscription commerce ecosystem.

data.title: Visa, AWS launch infrastructure for AI-driven agentic commerce
data.description: Visa has framed the initiative as foundational to the emerging agent-based economy.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Abercrombie & Fitch, Urban Outfitters and more
data.description: Ecommerce helped Abercrombie & Fitch as it shared its latest agentic commerce news with Q3 earnings results.
